title: Vanilla pvp+
description: For pvp Tiers & training pvp or just pvp
body:
# **REQ: OPTIFINE or CIT RESEWN**


![FEATURE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/898382974a118acb789f2839773ffd35d0dafc3a_0.webp)

**✅ Vanilla‑friendly look and feel**

🔥**Low Fire** (see more while burning)

🎯 **Clean HUD & Transparent GUIs**

**🗡️ No blinking heart**

**✨ Unobtrusive Particles (Small particles)**

**🧵 Distinct Ores and Cleaner Block Borders**

**🥽 Transparent Pumpkin & Spyglass Overlays**

**🎣 Transparent Fishing Rod Bobber**

![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f451e68ad091d6a4fcd758bb17e3288c8ed339f4_0.webp)

# **Download the pack from Modrinth.**

**Move it to your resourcepacks folder:**

Windows: **%appdata%/.minecraft/resourcepacks**

macOS: **~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/resourcepacks**

Linux: **~/.minecraft/resourcepacks**

**In‑game: Options → Resource Packs → enable [Vanilla pvp+].**


<details>
<summary>Note</summary>

Performance Notes

Lighter textures **reduce VRAM usage** and visual clutter, which can improve FPS — results vary by system and settings.
Client‑side only; safe for servers and anti‑cheats.

</details>



# **My other creations & support**

**Got a bug or an idea? Let me know here!
Discord:**
```
xkofiak.
```

Christmas pack --> [Christmas](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/snowys-texturepack)

This is for Pvp'ers Texturepack  --> [Clean pvp pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clean-pvp-texturepack)


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>
Vanilla Tweaks:
  
Softer Wool
  
Brighter Nether

Shorter Tall & Short grass

Smoother Stones

Variated Moss & Carved Pumpkins

Quieter Pistons

Ore Borders

Directional Hoppers,Dispensers,Droppers,Observers

Clean Redstone Dust

Visible Tripwires

Redstone Power levels

Arabic Numerals

Brewing Guide

Clean Stained & Tinted Glass

Unobstrusive Scaffolding

Borderless Glass

No Vignette

Smooth Font

Dungeons Creepers

Super Smash Bros Enderman



</details>
